name: python3-googlesearch
title: python3-googlesearch
description:
Google search engine (Python 3)
This package contains Python bindings for the Google search engine.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

commands.name: googlesearch
commands.description: Python script to use the Google search engine

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use googlesearch because Google search engine (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use googlesearch as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `googlesearch [options] [args]` as documented upstream for googlesearch.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair googlesearch with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `googlesearch --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
